reviewText: all good
sonu waiter has served efficiently
Service needs to be looked upon. Picking up plates by staff service while eating food is not accepted.

excellent experience, great food, great setting.

Mr Sonu was courteous to us. I rate him very high
keep up the good work
Absolutely love the vibe here — warm lights, elegant setup, and great music in the background. The food at Lotus Leaf was just as impressive. 🌼
From the first bite to the last, everything tasted perfect. The chefs at Lotus Leaf truly know how to balance flavors and presentation beautifully. 💖
Mohan Bhatt given good service fast and delicious food
a bit expensive but they have quality food.

It was a great experience. Food was good mainly pink sauce pasta. I would give 4.5/5. staff was very polite mainly Sonu & Prabhakar ji.
Would definitely visit again.

In terms of food soup quality should be improved.
Absolutely loved the vibe at Lotus Leaf! The place has a peaceful charm and serves some really good food. Every dish was beautifully presented and packed with flavors. 😋
Had an amazing dining experience at Lotus Leaf! The ambiance is calm and soothing — perfect for a cozy dinner. The staff was polite, and the food exceeded expectations. 🌿💫
Such a lovely dining experience! The ambiance at Lotus Leaf is calm and elegant, and the food is full of rich, fresh flavors. Perfect for a peaceful evening out. 🌷
Lotus Leaf has quickly become one of my favorite places to dine. The interiors are beautiful, the staff is courteous, and the dishes taste divine. ✨
Visited Lotus Leaf for lunch and it was wonderful! The presentation was top-notch, and the flavors were subtle yet impressive. A must-try for anyone who enjoys quality dining. 🍽
Loved the frozen strawberry margarita. Special thanks to Manoj for arranging the drink for me.
good food.
Lotus Leaf is such a refreshing spot! The interiors are elegant, the food is flavorful, and the service is top-notch. Loved how every dish felt freshly made and full of taste. 🍽️✨
Visited Lotus Leaf with friends and had a great time! The ambiance is lovely, the service is quick, and the food tastes authentic. Perfect spot for both casual and fine dining. 🍷
Lotus Leaf impressed me with its warm hospitality and elegant setting. The food was delicious, and the whole experience felt premium. Definitely a must-try! 💐
